name.en-US: ELT-2-IA Elsys LoRaWAN Multipurpose Sensor (Internal Antenna)
name.pt-BR: ELT-2-IA Sensor Multiuso (Antena Interna) LoRaWAN Elsys

description.en-US: Elsys ELT-2-IA — LoRaWAN (Class A) indoor sensor that monitors temperature, humidity and light. Uplinks are Elsys TLV frames on FPort 5.
description.pt-BR: Elsys ELT-2-IA — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) de ambiente interno que monitora temperatura, umidade e luz. Os uplinks são quadros TLV Elsys no FPort 5.
